author: Lucky AI Team
name: lucky-ai
description: AI-powered Discord cog for roasts, TLDR summaries, chat Q&A, and hot takes. Supports 7 AI providers with automatic fallback and a streamlined setup flow.
install_msg: Cog installed. Run `[p]load lucky_ai` to activate it, then `[p]lsetup` in the target server. `lsettings` also works immediately as a prefix command if you want to skip slash-command setup.
short: AI roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, and hot takes
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord message IDs, user IDs, command usage, and message content in a local SQLite database inside Red's cog data directory for AI processing features (roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, hot takes). Message content is only stored from channels explicitly configured by server admins. Users can opt out with `[p]loptout out`, and Red deletion requests are supported.
